name: Improper Handling of Unicode Encoding
description: The product does not properly handle Unicode-encoded input, including overlong UTF-8 sequences, homoglyphs, or Unicode normalization forms, allowing attackers to bypass ASCII-based security filters or create visually confusing identifiers.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides Unicode-encoded data (overlong UTF-8, fullwidth characters, homoglyphs, unnormalized forms) that bypasses CONTROL[ascii_filter] while the downstream TRANSFORM or EXTERNAL normalizes the Unicode and interprets the malicious content, without a TRANSFORM[unicode_normalize] (NFC/NFKC) applied before the security check
